title: Production Ops / Go-No-Go v3
decision_rationale: The GL-200 through GL-203C hardening sequence closed concrete gaps (tenant isolation baseline, auth hardening, migration fixes, OpenAPI cleanup, internal SDK prototype). However, P0 production blockers remain: no live PostgreSQL validation, no automated backup/DR, no production observability, no TLS/container hardening, no production IAM, admin-plane tenant isolation deferred. Developer Preview and Controlled Preview (within GL-198 boundaries) continue. Production SaaS, real customer data, and private grant/institutional data decisions are all no-go. GL-203D projection gate is NOT passed — deferred pending RB-001 through RB-004 resolution.

achieved: Tenant/workspace isolation baseline: columns, filtering, auth context injection across all primary business resource tables (GL-200A/B/C)
Production auth/secrets/config hardening: fail-closed startup, placeholder token rejection, CORS localhost warning (GL-201)
Migration runner hardening: failure context, dry-run API, comment-skip fix, audit backfill immutability fix (GL-202)
OpenAPI contract cleanup: 36 paths documented, consistent error shapes, security schemes documented (GL-203B)
Internal SDK prototype: examples/sdk_prototype/python/, no official SDK claimed, no package metadata (GL-203C)
In-process structured logging baseline: logging_utils.py, structured_logging.py, correlation ID, rate limiter
Audit hash-chain with dual-mode for legacy and new events
Basic backup/restore procedures documented for SQLite
remaining_p0_blockers: No automated backup system; no DR runbooks
No production observability stack (no external metrics, alerting, tracing)
No production deployment hardening (TLS, container, orchestration)
current_state_summary.posture: Developer Preview / Controlled Preview with strict boundaries — not production SaaS

tenant_workspace_readiness.stale_claims_note: README, AGENTS.md, SECURITY.md, llms.txt still say 'Not implemented' despite GL-200A/B/C baseline; correction deferred pending coordinated test changes

remaining_gaps: No production IAM (OAuth, JWT, SSO, HSM-backed key management)
Demo Ed25519 keypair in repo — production requires external key management
No token rotation API — manual bootstrap required
CORS origins require explicit operator configuration for production

persistence_postgres_migration_readiness.live_postgresql_validation_blocker: RB-001 — no PostgreSQL instance available for testing
remaining_gaps: SimpleConnectionPool not exercised with real connections
Stale tenant isolation claim in some downstream docs
workspace_id enforcement not reflected in runtime behavior
Error/security/tenant behavior documentation not audited for external partner integrations
No official SDK release path (packaging, semver, support SLA)
workspace_id not exposed (reflects deferred server-side status)
Admin-plane management not exposed (correct given GL-200D deferral)
sdk/python/README.md stale caveat requires coordinated update
Container hardening (non-root, read-only FS) not documented
DR runbooks exist as design only — not exercised
No operator management runbook exercisable yet
No admin HTTP API for operator CRUD (operators/me GET only)

public_claim_safety_assessment.readme_stale_claim_note: Says 'Not implemented' — should say 'baseline implemented, not production-complete' since GL-200A/B/C

gl203c_prohibited_claims_inconsistency_r.finding: GL-204 issue brief noted: 'GL-203C screenshot table showed possible inconsistency: Prohibited claims included: NO'
gl203c_prohibited_claims_inconsistency_r.explanation: The 'Prohibited claims included: NO' wording in the review context means the document does NOT make prohibited claims (correct safety behavior). GL-203C JSON includes a prohibited_public_claims list of 10 items and all safety confirmations set to true. No correction to GL-203C artifacts is required.

go_no_go_decision_matrix.Controlled Preview Expansion: CONDITIONAL — synthetic/demo data only, no real data, no new external participants without explicit gate
go_no_go_decision_matrix.Experimental Public SDK/Package: CONDITIONAL/DEFER — GL-203D projection gate NOT passed
go_no_go_decision_matrix.First External Controlled Pilot: CONDITIONAL — synthetic/demo data only within GL-198 boundaries

controlled_preview_boundary_decision.expansion_rationale: All P0 blockers from Section 13 must be addressed before any expansion
boundary_rules: Synthetic/demo data only — no real customer data
No private grant or institutional records
Security reports via GitHub Security Advisories
No tenant isolation validation with real tenants

production_saas_decision.rationale: Multiple P0 blockers: no live PostgreSQL, no backup/DR, no production observability, no TLS/container hardening, no production IAM, admin-plane tenant isolation deferred

real_data_private_grant_data_decision.rationale: Tenant isolation not production-complete; no live PostgreSQL validation; no backup/DR; compliance requirements not assessed

official_sdk_package_decision.rationale: Internal prototype only; no package metadata; no semver commitment; no support SLA; GL-203D deferred

blockers: RB-008: Stale claims in README/AGENTS.md must be corrected before external SDK documentation
conditions_to_unblock: GL-205 (Live PostgreSQL Validation / Backup-Restore / Observability Baseline) passes
GL-206 or GL-200D (Admin-plane tenant isolation) resolved or explicitly scoped out of SDK surface

conditions: No real customer, private grant, or institutional data
Explicitly scoped within GL-198 controlled preview boundary
Security reports via GitHub Security Advisories
forbidden: Real tenant data or multi-tenant deployment

remaining_blockers.description: Live PostgreSQL validation — no end-to-end PostgreSQL test run completed
Automated backup/restore system — no scheduled backup, no pg_dump automation, no DR runbooks exercised
Production observability stack — no external metrics, alerting, or tracing; stdlib logging only
Admin-plane tenant isolation (GL-200D) — operator management not cross-tenant-safe
Production deployment hardening — no TLS termination, no container hardening, no orchestration
Production IAM — no OAuth, JWT, SSO, or HSM-backed key management
workspace_id enforcement — reserved/nullable/deferred; not enforced at API level
Stale tenant isolation claims — README, AGENTS.md, SECURITY.md, llms.txt still say 'Not implemented'
Evidence/provenance secondary-path tenant isolation — partial; adversarial multi-tenant not verified
PostgreSQL pg_stat_activity privilege requirement — not tested in hardened configs

risk_register.risk: PostgreSQL migration failure in production deployment due to untested code path
risk_register.mitigation: Complete live PostgreSQL validation (RB-001) before any PostgreSQL deployment

risk_register.risk: Data loss if SQLite backup procedure not followed before schema upgrades
risk_register.mitigation: Document and enforce backup-before-upgrade runbook; block schema changes without backup

risk_register.risk: Auth token misconfiguration in staging/production mode
risk_register.mitigation: startup_errors() fail-closed gate verified; monitor startup logs

risk_register.risk: Stale README/AGENTS.md claim causes over-reliance on claimed isolation
risk_register.mitigation: Correct stale claims in dedicated follow-up; GL-200A/B/C isolation baseline is in place

risk_register.risk: Unvalidated external pilot exceeds GL-198 boundaries
risk_register.mitigation: Explicit scoping and approval required per Section 12 of GL-204

risk_register.risk: GL-203D proceeding without GL-204 gate clearance
risk_register.mitigation: GL-204 explicitly defers GL-203D; this document is the projection gate record

risk_register.risk: Admin-plane cross-tenant operator management attempted before GL-200D
risk_register.mitigation: Do not expose operator management to multi-tenant contexts; document boundary in operator runbooks

risk_register.risk: Observability absent during first production-like deployment
risk_register.mitigation: Implement GL-205 observability baseline before any production deployment

findings.summary: Live PostgreSQL validation absent — code paths hardened but not end-to-end tested
No automated backup or DR runbooks — SQLite procedures documented only
findings.recommendation: GL-205: Backup-restore drill and DR runbook exercise

findings.summary: No external metrics, alerting, or tracing — stdlib logging only
Admin-plane isolation (GL-200D) deferred — operator management cross-tenant unsafe
TLS, container hardening, orchestration not implemented
README/AGENTS.md/SECURITY.md/llms.txt stale: still say 'Tenant isolation: Not implemented' despite GL-200A/B/C baseline
findings.recommendation: Coordinated claim correction in GL-207; deferred to dedicated issue

findings.summary: GL-203C 'Prohibited claims included: NO' — classified as reporting wording inconsistency, not safety gap
findings.recommendation: No action required; GL-203C safety confirmations are intact

findings.summary: workspace_id enforcement deferred — SDK and server both reflect reserved status correctly
GL-203C prototype is internal-only and safe — no official SDK claim; GL-203D deferred per projection gate
findings.recommendation: Follow GL-203D conditional path after blocker resolution (RB-001 through RB-004, RB-008)

recommended_next_issues.description: Merge gl-204-production-ops-go-no-go-v3 to internal main after validation
Live PostgreSQL Validation / Backup-Restore Drill / Observability Baseline — close RB-001, RB-002, RB-003. Required before any production deployment or GL-203D.
Admin-Plane Tenant Isolation (GL-200D) — close RB-004. Required before production multi-tenant deployment.
Stale Claim Correction — update README, AGENTS.md, SECURITY.md, llms.txt tenant isolation claim with coordinated test changes.

recommended_next_issues.condition: Only after GL-205, GL-206, GL-207, and GL-204 merge complete
recommended_next_issues.description: Experimental Public SDK / Packaging — design packaging pipeline, semantic versioning, and experimental public release. Do not proceed before GL-204 projection gate blockers are resolved.
